extension.summary: CPM Estuary Search - Modified from CPM's Estuary Mod (originally by phil65)
CPM Estuary Search - 基于CPM.Estuary修改
extension.description: Modified Kodi skin based on CPM's Estuary (original Estuary by phil65, CPM enhancements by cpm-code).[CR][CR]Changes:[CR]- Quick filtering via magnifier button[CR]- Semi-transparent UI[CR]- Poster wall view with title display[CR]- OSD: independent audio track button with auto-popup[CR]- OSD: VS10 button alignment[CR]- Default font changed to Arial for Chinese support[CR]- Player Process Info DV/HDR page fully localized to Chinese (25 new strings)[CR]- Nit column right-aligned[CR]- AML hardware decode FPS label layout optimized[CR]- Fixed RPU/BL/EL indicator encoding corruption in Variables.xml

基于 CPM.Estuary修改(原作者 phil65,cpm-code)[CR]项目地址:github.com/forbxy[CR]改动项：[CR]- 绑定放大镜按钮快捷打开筛选页面[CR]- 可将电影海报设为皮肤常驻背景图[CR]- 界面整体半透明化[CR]- 海报墙视图显示影片名称[CR]- OSD 新增独立音轨按钮，聚焦自动弹窗[CR]- OSD VS10 按钮对齐[CR]- 默认字体改为 Arial，防止中文乱码[CR]- 播放器进程信息页 DV/HDR 全部中文翻译
extension.disclaimer: This is a modified skin based on CPM Estuary. Use at your own risk.
本皮肤基于 CPM Estuary 修改，使用风险自负。
